summary: Iteration 333 - Service Cards UI + Category Seeding + Marketplace Wiring testing. All backend tests passed (11/11). Frontend UI tests passed. ServiceCardsSection and CantFindWhatYouNeedBanner both working correctly on marketplace page.

minor.issue: Only 1 service category exists (Printing & Stationery) instead of expected 6 service categories (Printing & Branding, Creative & Design, Facilities Services, Technical Support, Office Branding, Uniforms & Workwear). Categories may not have been seeded via curl PUT calls as mentioned in context.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Seed the remaining 5 service categories (Creative & Design, Facilities Services, Technical Support, Office Branding, Uniforms & Workwear) if they are required for the MVP. Currently only 'Printing & Stationery' exists as a service category.
OPTIONAL: Verify that 'Stationery' product category exists separately from 'Printing & Stationery' service category if both are needed.
critical_code_review_comments: catalog_taxonomy_service.py: Lines 288-289 contain unreachable code (duplicate return statements after line 286)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ServiceCardsSection and CantFindWhatYouNeedBanner are working correctly. Taxonomy has 2 groups (Products, Services). Only 1 service category exists (Printing & Stationery with subcategories: Business Cards, Flyers, Banners). Quote requests submit successfully with source=service_cards and source=marketplace_cta.
